package.name: formation_agent
package.description: Decentralized formation-control agent for the D-MUTRA swarm experiments. A self-contained rclcpp executable (all control logic in its own .text) that holds a rigid multi-robot formation toward a global goal using only neighbor odometry (Artificial Potential Fields). Its 10 Hz tick loop is the runtime tampering target: corrupting it perturbs the published cmd_vel and drags the coupled formation off course while remaining inside the attested .text section, so swarm-level damage scales with attestation detection latency.
